textByHash.c409d63facd8eddb3c737e210a8d2487c2bed13b: Oh, hello. I'd love to chat right now, but I'm a bit busy. Perhaps you could come back and chat another time?
textByHash.69b2170f9a49aee06a1653e6cf59bb671d972f0b: No, no. My name is Rat. Rat Burgiss.
textByHash.1e7707154c5835738997691f4da61320c97c9b05: It's Rat, thank you. And I, uh...heh...I seem to be in a bit of trouble here, as you can probably see.
textByHash.4469635251145e03aab2fc3ca55ec7614b3e3568: Well, I'm a trader by nature and I was on the way to Varrock with my cart here when I was set upon by outlaws! They ransacked my cart and stole some very important papers that I must get back.
textByHash.187a22615fc45e71d2056b50983c15c082e7decb: Yes, I know! I don't know how I survived.
textByHash.adcaf3a636effb712e865760c6c4221ec9d229a5: Look, do you want to help me or not?
textByHash.9c5c373068335fb4203927845a09495418802ade: Right, now I heard those outlaws say something about having a small camp site somewhere to the north-west of Varrock. They headed off to the north-west of here. They took 5 pages with them.
textByHash.46afe1e158eb88aa4ab10bc22fb99aef3ee985ed: Kill the outlaws and get those papers back from them for me. Here's a folder in which you can put the pages. Be careful, though; those outlaws are tough.
textByHash.823fac5aebd8dd81630cef4791056824f3f14f14: When you find all 5 pages, put them in the folder and bring them back to me!
textByHash.3b216ccc57c8a1ba7e6b2f5906fb244420cf393a: Oh, wait a minute. I was going to give you a folder in which to collect my papers, but you haven't got enough room for it. Talk to me when you do.
textByHash.4e87a93ec31f15ce58b3be707643666c5bf61255: Oh well. I'll just wait here then and maybe some nice person will help me. Perhaps...one day...
textByHash.cd72e23bdf2059001cef58292add27954eb4c6ae: No! Not at all! Nuh-uh! Nope! Hardly! Noooo, no no no!
textByHash.293fea91e8094af06ce86d4dfbf1164cd225b905: No...I mean yes... Look, that's besides the point. Can you help me?
textByHash.36b1c419d8bb5021d4a4008a497bb84827c69e36: You mean you want to help?
textByHash.9e15548550f1aaa983dc5397d17b3cb21cac22e1: Head north-west from here into the forest north-west of Varrock. Find the Outlaw Camp and kill the outlaws there.
textByHash.dbd0765777dddc18044f45601a00faaa76416394: Collect the pages of my document for me and put them into the folder I gave you. When the folder contains 5 pages, bring it to me!
textByHash.1a88d3340b400913cbd7e154fcd517eb95e6550b: Sure. Here you go. I'll add it to your account.
textByHash.f5b0684621a0dad5070811ca0dfe8d9aae10ce11: No, it's just the way you're standing!
textByHash.d529cc3312eb189bca0bf5591734298001fba909: Yes, that's the folder I gave you. I need you to fill it with pages for me.
textByHash.abcc1b88072bfc5e4bfce688de3e2fcd82b4e46f: Yes! That's one of my papers! Gather all 5 of them and put them into that folder I gave to you.
textByHash.7df8d65d358fa5b676cc39c5ff892534a1ac44c9: Ah! It looks like you have found some of the pages I need. You still need more, though.
textByHash.d265d8d7d6032e8d7df14872e554bf5ae18cadf8: Excellent! I knew you could help! Let me take those from you, there.
textByHash.d69c30e885cce6e7dbc276a65e879b8f6265dd86: Now, I liked the way you handled yourself on that last little 'mission' I gave you there, so I'm going to let you in on a little secret!
textByHash.7494ca7c80574bd99a0d4623507b7e7badcb157f: Uhhh...no. No, that's not it. You know, on second thought, I think I'll keep my secret for now. Look, instead, you can do another job for me.
textByHash.6c002bd3578a7c253e046fcb28f06b6b5eb5305b: Yes, well, I'm sure that may be the case. However, what I want you to do is take this letter to someone for me. It's in a different language so, trust me, you won't be able to read it.
textByHash.de1666015ae778796d26c78552f929892e7fd834: Take it to a wizard named Surok Magis who resides in the Varrock Place Library. I'll see about some sort of reward for your work when I get myself sorted out here.
textByHash.0eb1be215a4224ad50bef88c2caf1bb13d16e98f: That's probably because you've replaced it with something else, by the looks of it! Talk to me when you have some space in your inventory!
textByHash.4459c799f0e7c95920dca00f89da3ab5fe4bdce9: Goodness me! Not much of a messenger, are you? Here's another one; try not to lose it this time! I've charged the parchment to your account.
textByHash.18e30e425a24bb1dbc3936c68f68a16f51baeeef: Ah! Good to see you! I heard you got my letter to Surok. Well done!
textByHash.19826e99610f0fdc87610130c86308ad0a8a71fa: Yes, of course! I'd be happy to give you a reward, but I have a lot on my mind with...you know...trader...stuff!
textByHash.f187b54d4d92bcdae5aae2db8e3c3744ff91de26: I see! It looks pretty magical; I'd be careful with that if I were you!
textByHash.18c400514c9f5d5112185e56a9de1140941f84e4: This letter is treasonous! This does indeed confirm my worst fears. It is time I let you into my secret and hopefully this will answer any questions you may have.
textByHash.88bfd7fff26bcfc66f43a0f4c85e7216fa3af402: I am not really a trader. I am the Commander of the Varrock Palace Secret Guard. VPSG for short.
textByHash.ad3dc16ba73450bbb52df0c72571ab56dadebbaf: I'm just getting to that. A short while ago, we received word that Surok had discovered a powerful mind-control spell and intended to use it on King Roald himself!
textByHash.b8abbf0ef66c594fab593bc9644c36edb4fbf3a6: He could control the whole kingdom that way!
textByHash.5bc9b95b3a9cfa51739fdba5f1b1a2994093e59c: Yes, but until now, the spell has been useless to him as he is currently under guard at the palace and not allowed to leave. He could not get the tools for the spell because if he left the palace he would be arrested!
textByHash.da96ffef8ffc86cb6ff1e2a9cd045c01b0793d75: Yes, we heard that somehow Surok had obtained the things he needed but we were not sure how. I thought it might have been you.
textByHash.db7833105cf5f450b1d2a4139a2d025930456095: However, I assumed you did not know of his plans; that is why you weren't arrested!
textByHash.75d6e0531a678ff3f7effdff5ed4397e042dde4a: Okay, here's what I need you to do. One of my contacts has devised a spell that he is sure will be able to counteract the effects of the mind-control spell. I need you to visit him.
textByHash.bead29895283f525eb97379a121afdfe7be2b693: His name is Zaff. He runs a staff shop in Varrock. Go and speak to him and he will tell you what you should do. I will send word to him to let him know that you are coming.
textByHash.b4459fecdd3083d7b04cb22b3c3199ccc50319ea: I'm sure I don't know what you mean. Let me see the letter, please.
textByHash.25e2f3fd938a42cc7eea09aa4c8a221eb6dcf630: Yes. I still haven't found someone to help me yet, but I hear you've been very busy yourself!
textByHash.c5448f3dbb8cf366ef49212729b8eb435cbe80a9: Oh, I have my sources. Was there anything else?
textByHash.2045c51fb693f01fec41b2e52455bbfe17ef6ed5: You need to go and see Zaff. He can be found at 'Zaffs Staffs', the staff shop in Varrock. He will tell you what to do next.
textByHash.b770f8bd0e0cf9d4a8563084a32bcf3f32e3c8e3: Surok is a powerful mage and ruthless too. Who knows what will happen. I am sure that we will prevail, though. Don't worry! You'll be fine!
textByHash.cec77cd4c2265e350898a56f4c129c97c8c84541: No, I'm afraid I have nothing in stock, largely due to the fact that I'm not really a trader, as I just mentioned.
textByHash.6ffb1cd67fd1e1c3633e3275bb470a17afc9c718: Why exactly are you still here?
textByHash.9cd8ce4cf34b0b3f2373c60de1367e8151b58bc5: Ooh! Shiny! I would take it, but I'd probably have to sell it. I have a wife and 17 children to feed!
textByHash.642c8d8eeb6bef725ee310cab92ca12528f07741: Besides, you probably need it more than me right now!
textByHash.f17fd021c45ae83e949977969150d5f37923d52b: Excellent! In that case, we are all set and ready to foil Surok's plans!
textByHash.06d6196152b40b917473b4963d3e2192e9236658: Now it is all down to you. As you have proven yourself in the tasks I have set you, I am making you an honorary member of the VPSG!
textByHash.05dd0410c9c4c28319259701d994b1e5f7575d16: Well...no. But we do have a nice lady called Emma who makes the tea on Mondays.
textByHash.91df5fd22432e3cb45f8f4d2c99d7336ecaf4a38: Right then. You have an important task set out for you. Good luck!
textByHash.5159300cf83d753647c39f8ab22f6e9be1182459: You will need to go and speak to Surok now. Arrest him under the authority of the Varrock Palace Secret Guard.
textByHash.38ad5962857a51057e085cf30fff9ef48f2d8a9c: It may be tough and Surok will most likely not be arrested without a fight, so be on your guard!
textByHash.8bcb6318cf812c1a85e37bfefd1614dae9b89c61: How do you know of them?
textByHash.2f2c9f88d23ff60d73b53acc53717daebfcf74b6: I see. The Dagon'hai were a powerful order of Zamorakian mages who resided here in this very city.
textByHash.6dc05e43d6e0715dda243a1e24a5baa4dad38684: However, the priests of Saradomin warred ferociously with them and tried to destroy them. The Dagon'hai, though, were very clever and extremely cunning.
textByHash.c2e8e701b887b3d62e3b95f7af67a83a12928a1f: They hid themselves away within the city and, rumour has it, they even had a way of getting to the Wilderness and back without ever being seen, although I have no idea how that might have been.
textByHash.c9b8cb01e790a96f866ff60a937c379272b6faed: Nobody knows. They disappeared from the city a hundred years ago and very few people even remember who they were.
textByHash.00688a16a3d8bba32d6902790e959c17270fb801: My grandfather's brother, my great uncle, was a priest of Saradomin and he would tell me stories of the wars with the Dagon'hai as a child.
textByHash.268a6c33e6d357ff973acd8631d2cf21f544cce5: Then you will have to go and speak to Zaff at Zaff's Staffs to get another one!
textByHash.12d4c7238794f01a202d52ab9b0f4df73bbcdab8: You shouldn't mock your commanding officer, private! Don't forget, I can still have you arrested for conspiracy with Surok!
textByHash.e04dd7ce74ce1663e09716242a8c906b4f3a2c63: Unfortunately, as an honorary member of the VPSG, you only get to act under our authority. You aren't entitled to the full Secret Guard package.
textByHash.b9710f00bf63adf00c7504a7905e335ecabd9f10: Yes, you have an important job! Good luck!
textByHash.0b9799c4b4dd04ec898497b9efef6dc51047bc27: I take it that it went alright, then? That's great news!
textByHash.22477dd0589fb3ac44dd9089c287e6338e4ade49: Zaff has already briefed me on the events. We will arrange for Surok to be fed and watched. I think he will not be a problem any more.
textByHash.62a7a417972df602ad13b9c7b6265e84ff1d9fb8: Yes, you are right. But rest assured, we will be watching him much more closely from now on.
textByHash.06adc2fe6edfa0000423402e5c0011e0ac2d5c69: You've done very well and have been a credit to the VPSG; perhaps one day there may be a place for you here!
textByHash.4bc0b1c7a7b427ece1917e9ff0dce7a323e8df08: In the meantime, let me reward you for what you've done, give you a little training. I will be sure to call on you if we ever need help in the future.
textByHash.98acac3fab2ff6400b5c087156f6ba7616becb02: Ah! ! You did a fine service for us. You might make a good member of the VPSG one day, with a little training and a bit more muscle!
textByHash.3ba68c9c523ba1599830794d6d46ab8c283ac5dd: At the moment, no. Things seem pretty quiet. However, I have heard a rumour about something strange going on in...hmm, no, I think we can handle this one for now.
textByHash.3fb5e33b9374c12e93520d4ad7dab1828194a48f: But, who knows? We may need your assistance again soon. Thank you.
textByHash.a9388b4ce60a1bec96f9134cb2e054985646717c: No problem! Say, have you been to see the Wizards' Tower in the south yet? It's an amazing sight! You should go and see it!
